name: Invoicing & Receivables
author: civicognita
description: Create invoices, track unpaid + aging buckets (30/60/90), draft polite payment reminders. Composes with the Accounting Ledger MApp when both are installed.

permissions.reason: Reads invoice records + (optionally) Accounting MApp's ledger for posted AR entries
AI-assisted invoice drafting + payment reminder language

widgets.content:
## Invoicing & Receivables

Project-scoped invoicing with aging-bucket tracking. Stores entries in `k/mapps/invoicing/`:

- `invoices/<inv-id>.json` — one invoice per file (line items, totals, terms, sent/paid status)
- `reminders/<inv-id>-<n>.json` — drafted reminder messages, numbered by send sequence
- `clients.json` — client registry (name, email, billing address, payment terms)

### Common workflows

- **Create an invoice** — draft line items, totals, payment terms; ask the assistant to format polished line descriptions
- **Track unpaid** — list invoices past due, grouped by 0-30 / 30-60 / 60-90 / 90+ aging buckets
- **Draft a reminder** — for an aged invoice, ask the assistant to compose a polite (escalating-by-bucket) payment reminder

### When the Accounting MApp is also installed

Invoice creation can post a matching AR ledger entry to `k/mapps/accounting/ledger.jsonl` so the books reflect outstanding receivables in real time. Reconciliation works in both directions: payment recorded in accounting can mark the invoice paid; invoice paid in invoicing can post the cash receipt to accounting.

Ask the **invoice creator** below for line-item polish or the **collections summary** drafter for monthly reports.

prompts.label: Invoice Creator
prompts.description: During-workflow assist: polishes line item descriptions, suggests terms, computes totals + tax
prompts.systemPrompt: This is the project's invoicing MApp. Help the user draft an invoice — refine vague line item descriptions into client-ready language, suggest standard payment terms (Net 15, Net 30, etc.) appropriate to the relationship, compute subtotal + tax + total when given the rate, and flag anything missing from a complete invoice (PO number, description detail, billing address). Keep tone professional. When asked, also draft the polite payment reminder for an invoice past due — tone scales with the aging bucket: warm + curious for 30d, professional + firm for 60d, escalation-language for 90d+.

prompts.label: Collections Summary
prompts.description: Post-workflow narrative: monthly summary of receivables status, top outstanding clients, collection trends
prompts.systemPrompt: Given a snapshot of outstanding invoices (with client, amount, days outstanding) and the prior period's collections data, write a one-paragraph summary for a project owner who isn't a finance person. Highlight the top three signals: largest outstanding balances by client, oldest unpaid invoice + how long it's been outstanding, and any aging-bucket shifts vs prior period (e.g. '3 invoices moved from 30-60 to 60-90 this month — collection effort needed'). End with one concrete next-action suggestion (e.g. 'send reminders to the 5 clients in 60-90 bucket').

tools.label: Recent Invoices
tools.description: List the last 20 invoices with status + amount
tools.command: if [ -d k/mapps/invoicing/invoices ]; then ls -t k/mapps/invoicing/invoices/*.json 2>/dev/null | head -20 | xargs -I {} jq -c '{id, client: .client.name, amount: .total, status, due: .due_date}' {} 2>/dev/null; else echo 'No invoices yet — draft your first one with the invoice-creator assistant.'; fi

tools.label: Aging Buckets
tools.description: Group unpaid invoices into 0-30 / 30-60 / 60-90 / 90+ days outstanding
tools.command: if [ -d k/mapps/invoicing/invoices ]; then today=$(date +%s); jq -s --argjson today "$today" 'map(select(.status != "paid")) | map({id, client: .client.name, amount: .total, days_outstanding: ((($today - (.due_date | strptime("%Y-%m-%d") | mktime)) / 86400) | floor)}) | group_by(if .days_outstanding < 0 then "upcoming" elif .days_outstanding < 30 then "0-30" elif .days_outstanding < 60 then "30-60" elif .days_outstanding < 90 then "60-90" else "90+" end) | map({bucket: .[0] | (if .days_outstanding < 0 then "upcoming" elif .days_outstanding < 30 then "0-30" elif .days_outstanding < 60 then "30-60" elif .days_outstanding < 90 then "60-90" else "90+" end), count: length, total: (map(.amount) | add)})' k/mapps/invoicing/invoices/*.json 2>/dev/null; else echo 'No invoices yet.'; fi

tools.label: Total Outstanding (AR)
tools.description: Sum unpaid invoice amounts across all clients
tools.command: if [ -d k/mapps/invoicing/invoices ]; then jq -s 'map(select(.status != "paid")) | {count: length, total: (map(.total) | add), oldest: (sort_by(.due_date) | first | {id, client: .client.name, due: .due_date})}' k/mapps/invoicing/invoices/*.json 2>/dev/null || echo 'No invoices yet.'; else echo 'No invoices yet.'; fi
